completed_tasks.name: Harden read-only Meta MCP server and client

Publish release handoff docs and push code to remote branch

remaining_tasks.name: Decide whether this branch remains in rep01 or moves to a dedicated repository

blockers.description: Remote main belongs to an unrelated project (seo-ranker), so merging this branch into origin/main would be unsafe without an explicit repository strategy decision.
blockers.workaround: Keep working on origin/meta-ads-mcp-readonly or move the code to a dedicated repository before opening any merge flow.

blockers.description: GitHub CLI is not authenticated in this shell, so CI must be checked in the GitHub web UI or after re-authenticating gh.
blockers.workaround: Inspect Actions in the browser or run gh auth login before trying GitHub CLI operations.

human_actions_pending.action: Check the GitHub Actions run triggered by the push to origin/meta-ads-mcp-readonly.
human_actions_pending.context: The code is locally validated, but the first external CI run still needs to be observed.

human_actions_pending.action: Choose the remote strategy for this project.
human_actions_pending.context: rep01/main is another project, so this code currently lives on a separate branch only.

decisions.decision: Keep the product strictly read-only during all live validation.
decisions.rationale: This project is scoped as low-risk Meta Ads data access and must not mutate account state.

decisions.decision: Push to origin/meta-ads-mcp-readonly instead of origin/main.
decisions.rationale: The remote main branch has unrelated history and content, so preserving it avoids destructive publication mistakes.
It is local user configuration, not project source.

next_action: Start by checking the Actions run for branch meta-ads-mcp-readonly in https://github.com/wme-repository/rep01 and then decide whether to keep this project in that repo or move it to a dedicated repository.
context_notes: Code is code-complete locally. Local validation includes 33 passing tests, transport smoke checks, editable install plus console entrypoint validation, and live read-only UAT against a real allowlisted Meta account. Two project commits are published remotely on branch origin/meta-ads-mcp-readonly: 6e09b9f and 955bf49. Avoid attempting a PR into origin/main without first resolving repository strategy because origin/main is an unrelated seo-ranker project.
